title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Wipro Capital India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Wipro Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Wipro Capital India are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wipro Capital India:
Wipro Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro Capital India!
